overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic elevated urban plaza. The player ascends stairs and proceeds through a neon-lit commercial walkway with digital billboards and glass architecture, then descends to a ground-level colonnade. The environment features prominent cyan and purple neon lighting with high-end ray-traced reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairway ascending to elevated plaza

events.description: reaches top of stairs and transitions into the upper covered concourse

agents.ego_description: walking up wide concrete stairs toward an elevated urban platform at night

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with horizontal treads leading upward
smooth concrete wall with blue accent lighting running alongside the stairs
curved modern building facade with illuminated signage visible at the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person ascent up wide concrete stairs at night. The stairwell is flanked by smooth walls with blue accent lighting, leading toward an elevated commercial platform with a curved building visible at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated covered commercial walkway with glass towers

events.description: enters the neon-lit covered area with prominent cyan vertical light strips
passing the large purple neon 'NC' sign on the left wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the wide elevated plaza, passing modern glass structures and illuminated signage

entered.detail: rounded building facade with large digital billboard displaying 'Worry-free' advertisement
modern glass building with vertical cyan neon light strips running up the facade
large purple neon sign with stylized 'NC' lettering mounted on the left wall
suspended digital displays hanging from the ceiling showing advertisements
rectangular planter containing small trees or shrubs

segments.scene_description: Walking through a wide, covered elevated plaza with futuristic architecture. The right side features a glass office tower with prominent cyan neon vertical lighting, while the left has a curved building with digital billboards. The camera passes a large purple neon sign and suspended overhead screens as it moves forward through the polished walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with suspended digital displays

events.description: passing directly underneath the large suspended digital billboard structure

agents.ego_description: continuing through the corridor beneath overhead digital displays and advertisement screens

entered.detail: illuminated sign with yellow 'PURE OVERKILL' text visible at the end of the corridor
series of framed digital advertisement displays mounted on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The corridor narrows slightly as the camera proceeds beneath suspended digital billboards and overhead screens. The walls are lined with digital poster displays, and a 'PURE OVERKILL' sign becomes visible in the distance. The environment maintains the cyberpunk aesthetic with reflective floors and neon accents.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition stairway descending to lower commercial level

events.description: begins descending stairs to lower level, transitioning from upper concourse
reaches bottom of stairs and enters the ground-level colonnade area

agents.ego_description: walking down a stairway with metal railings toward a lower level with green neon 'OPEN' signs

entered.detail: metal handrail running alongside the descending stairs
green neon 'OPEN' signs glowing in the lower level ahead
smooth gray concrete walls lining the stairwell descent

segments.scene_description: The camera descends a stairway from the upper concourse to a lower level, passing concrete walls and metal railings. Green neon 'OPEN' signs become visible ahead, marking the transition to the ground-level commercial area. The lighting becomes dimmer and more enclosed compared to the upper level.

scene_state.functional_zone: ground-level colonnade with structural pillars and vending machines

events.description: passing vending machines and scattered debris on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the ground-level colonnade passing concrete pillars, vending machines, and scattered newspapers toward a bright exit

notable_agents.action: figure sitting near cardboard boxes in a makeshift camp area beside the vending machines

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete support columns lining the walkway
papers and debris littered across the concrete floor
illuminated vending machine with 'BIG' text and colorful graphics
large illuminated billboard with 'VARGAS' text and firework imagery
bright natural light streaming in from the end of the colonnade

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a ground-level colonnade with large structural pillars and scattered newspapers on the floor. The camera passes vending machines and a 'VARGAS' billboard while approaching a bright exit. A lone figure sits in a makeshift camp area to the left as the environment transitions from enclosed to open.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a brightly lit elevated commercial plaza down into a gritty, ground-level urban colonnade. It begins with an ascent up wide concrete stairs flanked by blue accent lighting, leading the camera onto a polished upper platform. As the camera moves forward, the space expands into a futuristic walkway defined by a glass office tower with cyan neon strips and curved buildings adorned with digital billboards and purple signage. The scene then narrows as it passes beneath suspended overhead screens and reflective walls before turning downward through a stairway, where the vibrant neon shifts toward dimmer tones and green open signs. Finally, the camera enters a ground-level colonnade characterized by heavy structural pillars, scattered newspapers, and vending machines, passing a makeshift camp before approaching a bright exit.
